ev1: The Velmaridge Accord established seven coastal jurisdictions along the Saltreach basin.
ev2: Each coastal jurisdiction under the Accord operates its own tidal levy office.
bridge_claim: The seven jurisdictions of the Velmaridge Accord each operate a tidal levy office.

ev1: Director Amelia Quorrenfeld leads the Pallisade Foundry research division.
ev2: The Pallisade Foundry research division is funded entirely by the Estren Heritage Trust.
bridge_claim: The division led by Director Amelia Quorrenfeld is funded by the Estren Heritage Trust.

ev1: The Brisanthe Protocol defines twelve escalation bands for grid faults.
ev2: Every escalation band in the Protocol is assigned a dedicated on-call engineer.
bridge_claim: Each of the twelve escalation bands in the Brisanthe Protocol has a dedicated on-call engineer.

ev1: The mineral veldrite is mined exclusively in the Tannock Highlands.
ev2: The Tannock Highlands fall within the borders of the Marn Confederacy.
bridge_claim: Veldrite is mined within the borders of the Marn Confederacy.

ev1: The Orsell Index ranks 38 trade routes by annual freight volume.
ev2: The top-ranked route on the Orsell Index is the Calder-to-Wexmoor corridor.
bridge_claim: The Calder-to-Wexmoor corridor has the highest annual freight volume of the 38 routes on the Orsell Index.

ev1: Captain Doran Velasti commands the survey ship Lantern of Hesperane.
ev2: The Lantern of Hesperane is the only vessel cleared to enter the Greyfen Shoals.
bridge_claim: Captain Doran Velasti commands the only vessel cleared to enter the Greyfen Shoals.

ev1: The Wrenmark Charter grants nine voting seats to the Lower Assembly.
ev2: Each voting seat in the Lower Assembly represents one river district.
bridge_claim: The nine voting seats granted by the Wrenmark Charter each represent a river district.

ev1: The compound theladrin is the active ingredient in Quessmoor antifreeze.
ev2: Quessmoor antifreeze is rated for temperatures down to minus 61 degrees on the Halvern scale.
bridge_claim: Theladrin is the active ingredient in an antifreeze rated to minus 61 degrees on the Halvern scale.

ev1: The Selvane Observatory catalogs 1,140 named star clusters.
ev2: Every named star cluster in the catalog is assigned to one of four observation watches.
bridge_claim: The 1,140 star clusters in the Selvane Observatory catalog are each assigned to one of four observation watches.

ev1: Engineer Pria Velnathe designed the Korrowend suspension bridge.
ev2: The Korrowend suspension bridge spans the Drennig Gorge.
bridge_claim: Engineer Pria Velnathe designed the bridge that spans the Drennig Gorge.

ev1: The Halberon Guild maintains 26 apprenticeship tracks for metalwork.
ev2: Each apprenticeship track in the Guild concludes with a journeyman's trial.
bridge_claim: Each of the Halberon Guild's 26 apprenticeship tracks concludes with a journeyman's trial.

ev1: The freight drone model Kestrel-9 has a service ceiling of 3,800 meters.
ev2: No drone with a service ceiling above 3,500 meters may operate over the Yannock Wetlands.
bridge_claim: The Kestrel-9 may not operate over the Yannock Wetlands.

ev1: The Vorrane Treaty recognizes five sovereign mountain cantons.
ev2: Each sovereign mountain canton under the Treaty mints its own currency.
bridge_claim: The five cantons recognized by the Vorrane Treaty each mint their own currency.

ev1: Archivist Lemuel Strane oversees the Tessworth Manuscript Vault.
ev2: The Tessworth Manuscript Vault holds the only surviving copy of the Endrith Codex.
bridge_claim: Archivist Lemuel Strane oversees the vault holding the only surviving copy of the Endrith Codex.

ev1: The Pellmire Reactor runs on a coolant called brenn-fluid.
ev2: Brenn-fluid is produced solely at the Garrow Chemical Works.
bridge_claim: The coolant for the Pellmire Reactor is produced solely at the Garrow Chemical Works.

ev1: The Stannock Ledger records 470 chartered merchant houses.
ev2: Every chartered merchant house in the Ledger pays an annual seal-fee of 90 marks.
bridge_claim: Each of the 470 merchant houses in the Stannock Ledger pays a 90-mark annual seal-fee.

ev1: The cultivar Brennwheat-7 was developed at the Olverhal Seed Station.
ev2: The Olverhal Seed Station is operated by the Ministry of Thessane Agriculture.
bridge_claim: Brennwheat-7 was developed at a station operated by the Ministry of Thessane Agriculture.

ev1: The Larnwick Festival features 33 competing artisan troupes.
ev2: Each competing artisan troupe at the Festival performs on the Grand Quillet stage.
bridge_claim: All 33 artisan troupes at the Larnwick Festival perform on the Grand Quillet stage.

ev1: Pilot Sera Tomavich holds the speed record for the Vendrake Pass route.
ev2: The Vendrake Pass route is closed to all traffic during the Hollow Months.
bridge_claim: Pilot Sera Tomavich holds the record for a route that is closed during the Hollow Months.

ev1: The Ossenbright Charter outlines four classes of harbor permit.
ev2: Each class of harbor permit under the Charter requires a separate annual inspection.
bridge_claim: Each of the four harbor permit classes in the Ossenbright Charter requires a separate annual inspection.

ev1: The alloy duramantine is used in the hull plating of the cruiser Wren's Tally.
ev2: Duramantine is forged only in the furnaces of Castle Bremmoth.
bridge_claim: The hull plating of the Wren's Tally uses an alloy forged only in the furnaces of Castle Bremmoth.

ev1: The Calthorn Survey divides the eastern plateau into 18 grazing tracts.
ev2: Each grazing tract in the Survey is leased to a single herding clan.
bridge_claim: Each of the 18 grazing tracts in the Calthorn Survey is leased to a single herding clan.

ev1: The Vellmar Compact assigns each cargo vessel a sealed manifest token before departure.
ev2: Every sealed manifest token is logged in the Driftwell Registry within four hours.
bridge_claim: The cargo vessels under the Vellmar Compact have their manifest tokens recorded in the Driftwell Registry.

ev1: Quarry Lake Station operates twelve gravity-fed water locks along its eastern channel.
ev2: Each of these twelve water locks is inspected by a certified Brennel warden.
bridge_claim: The water locks at Quarry Lake Station are inspected by certified Brennel wardens.

ev1: The Orsano Codex defines seven escalation grades for harbor disputes.
ev2: Each escalation grade is resolved by a single arbiter from the Halberd Guild.
bridge_claim: The escalation grades in the Orsano Codex are resolved by Halberd Guild arbiters.

ev1: Pilot Marisa Quoll commands the survey skiff named the Pale Lantern.
ev2: The Pale Lantern carries a tidal-mapping array built by the Wexford Foundry.
bridge_claim: The survey skiff commanded by Marisa Quoll carries a Wexford Foundry tidal-mapping array.

ev1: The Caldwich Accord requires every border outpost to maintain a triple-sealed grain reserve.
ev2: Each triple-sealed grain reserve is audited every ninety days by the Tessmark Bureau.
bridge_claim: The grain reserves mandated by the Caldwich Accord are audited by the Tessmark Bureau every ninety days.

ev1: Director Holloway Pim oversees the night shift at the Greywater Smeltery.
ev2: The Greywater Smeltery processes forty tonnes of slag-iron each working day.
bridge_claim: Holloway Pim oversees a night shift at a smeltery that processes forty tonnes of slag-iron daily.

ev1: The Sundering Charter grants the Marrow Coast nine independent fishing leases.
ev2: Each of these fishing leases expires at the close of the Brindle harvest.
bridge_claim: The Marrow Coast fishing leases granted under the Sundering Charter expire at the close of the Brindle harvest.

ev1: Engineer Dalia Frost designed the pressure baffles used in the Korrin Aqueduct.
ev2: The Korrin Aqueduct supplies drinking water to the township of Estreven.
bridge_claim: The aqueduct supplying drinking water to Estreven uses pressure baffles designed by Dalia Frost.

ev1: The Pellwitt Treaty establishes four tariff bands for overland salt convoys.
ev2: Each tariff band is collected at a designated tollhouse on the Asher Road.
bridge_claim: The tariff bands set by the Pellwitt Treaty are collected at tollhouses on the Asher Road.

ev1: Warden-Captain Soren Vale patrols the cliff route between Halloran Keep and the Thresh Beacon.
ev2: The Thresh Beacon signals incoming storms to every fleet in the Maren Strait.
bridge_claim: Soren Vale's cliff patrol reaches a beacon that signals storms to fleets in the Maren Strait.

ev1: The Ondre Foundation funds eleven scholarship berths at the Calliston Institute.
ev2: Each scholarship berth covers one full term of metallurgy instruction.
bridge_claim: The scholarship berths funded by the Ondre Foundation each cover a full term of metallurgy instruction.

ev1: The airship Cinder Wren is moored at the Vantle Heights skydock.
ev2: The Vantle Heights skydock charges a berthing fee of six talents per night.
bridge_claim: The airship Cinder Wren is moored at a skydock that charges six talents per night for berthing.

ev1: The Hesper Mandate divides the salt marsh into five conservation wards.
ev2: Each conservation ward is patrolled by a ranger from the Loamwatch Order.
bridge_claim: The conservation wards created by the Hesper Mandate are patrolled by Loamwatch Order rangers.

ev1: Curator Imogen Sayle maintains the relic vault beneath the Aldermoor Observatory.
ev2: The Aldermoor Observatory tracks the comet known as Veth's Wake every winter.
bridge_claim: Imogen Sayle maintains a relic vault beneath an observatory that tracks the comet Veth's Wake.

ev1: The Brannoch Guild issues a copper seal to each licensed dye-house in the lower quarter.
ev2: Every copper seal must be renewed before the Festival of Lamps each year.
bridge_claim: The copper seals the Brannoch Guild issues to dye-houses must be renewed before the Festival of Lamps.

ev1: Foreman Garrick Wend supervises the tunnel crews at the Sablecut Mine.
ev2: The Sablecut Mine yields a rare blue ore called pellumite.
bridge_claim: Garrick Wend supervises tunnel crews at a mine that yields the rare blue ore pellumite.

ev1: The Tarrowind Pact assigns each signatory province a quota of three river barges.
ev2: Each river barge must fly the pennant of the Cordage League.
bridge_claim: The river barges allotted under the Tarrowind Pact must fly the Cordage League pennant.

ev1: Surgeon Nell Brackwater runs the field infirmary at the Hollowford garrison.
ev2: The Hollowford garrison defends the only ford across the Sennick River.
bridge_claim: Nell Brackwater runs a field infirmary at the garrison defending the only ford across the Sennick River.

ev1: The Quillon Edict lists eight forbidden reagents for civic apothecaries.
ev2: Each forbidden reagent is catalogued with a warning glyph in the Mendell Index.
bridge_claim: The forbidden reagents named in the Quillon Edict are catalogued with warning glyphs in the Mendell Index.

ev1: Archivist Teodor Wisp keeps the cartography ledgers for the Sundrift Expedition.
ev2: The Sundrift Expedition charts the uncharted shoals beyond Cape Verrow.
bridge_claim: Teodor Wisp keeps cartography ledgers for the expedition charting the shoals beyond Cape Verrow.

ev1: The Marrowgate Concord sets a curfew of nine bells for all riverside wards.
ev2: This nine-bell curfew is enforced by the lantern-bearers of the Ninth Watch.
bridge_claim: The riverside curfew set by the Marrowgate Concord is enforced by the Ninth Watch lantern-bearers.

ev1: Captain Yara Dunmore leads the relief convoy bound for the famine-struck Olwen Vale.
ev2: The relief convoy carries six hundred sacks of barley from the Threshold Granary.
bridge_claim: Yara Dunmore leads a convoy to the Olwen Vale carrying six hundred sacks of Threshold Granary barley.

ev1: The Vellforth Accord establishes seven coastal trade zones across the Marrenel Strait.
ev2: Each of the seven coastal trade zones is administered by a single Harbor Reeve.
bridge_claim: The Vellforth Accord's coastal trade zones are each administered by a Harbor Reeve.

ev1: Project Tindermark catalogs forty-one heat-resistant alloys for deep-bore drilling.
ev2: Every heat-resistant alloy in the catalog is stamped with a Quenton serial code.
bridge_claim: Project Tindermark's catalogued alloys are stamped with Quenton serial codes.

ev1: The research vessel Aldris Pell carries nine sediment-coring rigs on its lower deck.
ev2: Each sediment-coring rig aboard the vessel is operated by a two-person Brennick crew.
bridge_claim: The Aldris Pell's sediment-coring rigs are each operated by a two-person Brennick crew.

ev1: Halvorsen Dynamics ships its Strelka turbine in six rotor configurations.
ev2: Each Strelka rotor configuration is certified for a distinct altitude band.
bridge_claim: Halvorsen Dynamics' Strelka rotor configurations are each certified for a distinct altitude band.

ev1: The Corvane Ledger records twelve overland caravan routes through the Doswell Flats.
ev2: Each overland caravan route in the ledger terminates at a fortified Greypost depot.
bridge_claim: The Corvane Ledger's caravan routes each terminate at a fortified Greypost depot.

ev1: The Maridian Charter defines five tiers of guild membership for its shipwrights.
ev2: Each tier of guild membership grants access to a separate Holwick dry dock.
bridge_claim: The Maridian Charter's guild membership tiers each grant access to a separate Holwick dry dock.

ev1: The Ostral Survey mapped twenty-three thermal vents along the Brask Ridge.
ev2: Each thermal vent on the ridge feeds a dedicated Penhallow monitoring buoy.
bridge_claim: The Ostral Survey's thermal vents each feed a dedicated Penhallow monitoring buoy.

ev1: The Dravven Institute runs eight isolation chambers for its acoustic experiments.
ev2: Each isolation chamber is lined with a proprietary Sorrel-foam baffle.
bridge_claim: The Dravven Institute's isolation chambers are each lined with a Sorrel-foam baffle.

ev1: The Kettleworth Compact assigns thirty-four irrigation channels across the Vask Lowlands.
ev2: Each irrigation channel is gated by a hand-cranked Munro sluice.
bridge_claim: The Kettleworth Compact's irrigation channels are each gated by a hand-cranked Munro sluice.

ev1: The orbital platform Selheim Cradle hosts fourteen docking cradles on its outer ring.
ev2: Each docking cradle on the outer ring is rated for a single Trellis-class hauler.
bridge_claim: The Selheim Cradle's docking cradles are each rated for a single Trellis-class hauler.

ev1: The Brachten Codex enumerates nineteen ceremonial titles within the Ovrend court.
ev2: Each ceremonial title in the codex carries a hereditary Wintermoor stipend.
bridge_claim: The Brachten Codex's ceremonial titles each carry a hereditary Wintermoor stipend.

ev1: The Pellmark Foundry produces twenty-six grades of casting sand for its molds.
ev2: Each grade of casting sand is sourced from a single Olbright quarry.
bridge_claim: The Pellmark Foundry's casting-sand grades are each sourced from a single Olbright quarry.

ev1: The Tannhaus Protocol divides its emergency response into eleven escalation stages.
ev2: Each escalation stage activates a different Corwen relay tower.
bridge_claim: The Tannhaus Protocol's escalation stages each activate a different Corwen relay tower.

ev1: The expedition leader Marsa Velloy charted sixteen glacial passes through the Dunmere Range.
ev2: Each glacial pass she charted is marked by a cairn of Halverstone slate.
bridge_claim: Marsa Velloy's charted glacial passes are each marked by a cairn of Halverstone slate.

ev1: The Quillane Archive preserves thirty-eight dialects of the old Serren tongue.
ev2: Each preserved dialect is transcribed using a unique Brodhal glyph set.
bridge_claim: The Quillane Archive's preserved dialects are each transcribed using a unique Brodhal glyph set.

ev1: The Vorne Conservatory trains its cadets across seven movement disciplines.
ev2: Each movement discipline is overseen by a ranking Tessler instructor.
bridge_claim: The Vorne Conservatory's movement disciplines are each overseen by a ranking Tessler instructor.

ev1: The mining concern Drelhammer Holdings operates fifteen ore shafts beneath Mount Cassek.
ev2: Each ore shaft is ventilated by a twin-fan Lossback assembly.
bridge_claim: Drelhammer Holdings' ore shafts are each ventilated by a twin-fan Lossback assembly.

ev1: The Anselmo Treaty partitions the river basin into nine fishing precincts.
ev2: Each fishing precinct is patrolled by a chartered Vendry cutter.
bridge_claim: The Anselmo Treaty's fishing precincts are each patrolled by a chartered Vendry cutter.

ev1: The Halberd Engine Works builds its Castellan locomotive in four boiler variants.
ev2: Each boiler variant burns a graded Threlkeld coke blend.
bridge_claim: The Halberd Engine Works' Castellan boiler variants each burn a graded Threlkeld coke blend.

ev1: The Sarvane Compendium lists twenty-two venoms drawn from the Wexmoor marsh fauna.
ev2: Each listed venom has a corresponding Druthers antitoxin recipe.
bridge_claim: The Sarvane Compendium's listed venoms each have a corresponding Druthers antitoxin recipe.

ev1: The agronomist Pieter Halloran developed thirteen drought-tolerant grain strains for the Cessmoor estates.
ev2: Each drought-tolerant grain strain he developed is registered under a Bellhaven seed lot.
bridge_claim: Pieter Halloran's drought-tolerant grain strains are each registered under a Bellhaven seed lot.

ev1: The Thornwick Mandate splits municipal oversight into ten civic wards.
ev2: Each civic ward elects a single Marrowgate alderman.
bridge_claim: The Thornwick Mandate's civic wards each elect a single Marrowgate alderman.

ev1: The deep-survey probe Lanthe Reach deployed twenty-nine pressure sensors along the Verrick Trench.
ev2: Each pressure sensor transmits on a dedicated Olwen frequency channel.
bridge_claim: The Lanthe Reach's pressure sensors each transmit on a dedicated Olwen frequency channel.

ev1: The Cresswell Guild certifies eighteen tiers of enamel craftsmanship for its artisans.
ev2: Each tier of enamel craftsmanship requires a sealed Pordwin kiln test.
bridge_claim: The Cresswell Guild's enamel craftsmanship tiers each require a sealed Pordwin kiln test.

ev1: The Halloway Concord designates thirty-three watchtowers along the Selmere frontier.
ev2: Each watchtower is garrisoned by a rotating Bracklin company.
bridge_claim: The Halloway Concord's watchtowers are each garrisoned by a rotating Bracklin company.

ev1: The Vantreth Foundry mill grinds twelve pigment bases for its glaze line.
ev2: Each pigment base is milled with a calibrated Osterly grindstone.
bridge_claim: The Vantreth Foundry's pigment bases are each milled with a calibrated Osterly grindstone.

ev1: The Marrowdeep Charter establishes eleven freight corridors across the Veluthi Basin.
ev2: Every freight corridor in the Veluthi Basin is patrolled by a single Sablewing cutter.
bridge_claim: The Marrowdeep Charter's freight corridors are each patrolled by a Sablewing cutter.

ev1: Thornwick Labs assigns a six-digit seal number to every batch of Quillen resin it cures.
ev2: Each Quillen resin seal number is logged in the Drennval provenance ledger.
bridge_claim: Thornwick Labs' resin seal numbers are logged in the Drennval provenance ledger.

ev1: The vessel Ornith Pell carries a crew of forty-three across the Harrowmoor crossing.
ev2: The Harrowmoor crossing requires every crew member aboard to hold a Tessward navigation badge.
bridge_claim: The forty-three crew members of the Ornith Pell hold Tessward navigation badges.

ev1: Project Vandermere catalogs nineteen distinct soil strata beneath the Calloway shelf.
ev2: Each soil stratum beneath the Calloway shelf is sampled twice per Brennan cycle.
bridge_claim: Project Vandermere's nineteen soil strata are each sampled twice per Brennan cycle.

ev1: The Halvard Accord recognizes seven trade guilds operating out of Port Quessin.
ev2: Every trade guild in Port Quessin contributes a delegate to the Mirelight Assembly.
bridge_claim: The seven trade guilds recognized by the Halvard Accord each contribute a delegate to the Mirelight Assembly.

ev1: Engineer Solveig Thrane designed the cooling lattice for the Pendrath reactor.
ev2: The Pendrath reactor supplies power to the entire Wexmoor district.
bridge_claim: Solveig Thrane designed the cooling lattice for the reactor that powers the Wexmoor district.

ev1: The Caldrene Treaty divides the Osprey Strait into four shipping lanes.
ev2: Each shipping lane in the Osprey Strait charges a toll of ninety Veltmark coins.
bridge_claim: Each of the four shipping lanes created by the Caldrene Treaty charges a ninety Veltmark coin toll.

ev1: The Brindlecombe Archive holds three hundred sealed manuscripts from the Yarrow dynasty.
ev2: Every Yarrow dynasty manuscript is transcribed by a scribe of the Felsen order.
bridge_claim: The Brindlecombe Archive's Yarrow dynasty manuscripts are transcribed by scribes of the Felsen order.

ev1: The Tannholm Refinery processes twelve grades of Korrick ore each season.
ev2: Each grade of Korrick ore is shipped exclusively to the Drassel foundry.
bridge_claim: The twelve grades of Korrick ore processed by the Tannholm Refinery are all shipped to the Drassel foundry.

ev1: Captain Imara Voss commands the survey ship Lentrell Dawn through the Sable Reaches.
ev2: The Sable Reaches are mapped under the authority of the Greythorn Cartographic Bureau.
bridge_claim: Captain Imara Voss surveys reaches mapped under the Greythorn Cartographic Bureau's authority.

ev1: The Penhallow Ordinance defines eight watch posts along the Merrowgate wall.
ev2: Each watch post on the Merrowgate wall is staffed by twelve Hollin sentries.
bridge_claim: Each of the eight watch posts defined by the Penhallow Ordinance is staffed by twelve Hollin sentries.

ev1: The Avenwood Conservatory cultivates fourteen strains of the Lysander vine.
ev2: Every strain of the Lysander vine yields a dye prized by the Castellan weavers.
bridge_claim: The fourteen Lysander vine strains cultivated by the Avenwood Conservatory yield dyes prized by the Castellan weavers.

ev1: The mining settlement of Grendle Hollow extracts ore from the Varrick seam.
ev2: The Varrick seam runs directly beneath the abandoned Pellmoor aqueduct.
bridge_claim: Grendle Hollow extracts ore from a seam that runs beneath the abandoned Pellmoor aqueduct.

ev1: The Dornwell Compact lists twenty-two heritage sites within the Brackenfen marsh.
ev2: Each heritage site in the Brackenfen marsh is monitored by a Calwyn warden.
bridge_claim: The Dornwell Compact's twenty-two heritage sites are each monitored by a Calwyn warden.

ev1: Archivist Toren Maelle authored the indexing scheme for the Selvarra collection.
ev2: The Selvarra collection was bequeathed to the Hollowmere University by the Estfield family.
bridge_claim: Toren Maelle's indexing scheme covers a collection bequeathed to Hollowmere University by the Estfield family.

ev1: The Quenwick Foundry casts sixteen bell types for the temples of Ashgrove.
ev2: Every bell type cast for Ashgrove temples is tuned to the Veridian scale.
bridge_claim: The sixteen bell types the Quenwick Foundry casts for Ashgrove temples are tuned to the Veridian scale.

ev1: The expedition vessel Marrowfast anchors at the Drevlin ice shelf each winter.
ev2: The Drevlin ice shelf is governed under the terms of the Hesperin Antarctic Pact.
bridge_claim: The Marrowfast anchors at an ice shelf governed under the Hesperin Antarctic Pact.

ev1: The Castermont Guild trains nine ranks of glasswrights in the city of Velloran.
ev2: Each rank of glasswright in Velloran wears a sigil forged from Tindel silver.
bridge_claim: The nine glasswright ranks the Castermont Guild trains in Velloran wear sigils forged from Tindel silver.

ev1: The Penswick Observatory tracks twenty-seven comets along the Orrindale arc.
ev2: Every comet on the Orrindale arc is named after a founder of the Brassmoor Society.
bridge_claim: The twenty-seven comets the Penswick Observatory tracks are each named after a Brassmoor Society founder.

ev1: Foreman Cael Drummond oversees the lock gates of the Wexholt canal.
ev2: The Wexholt canal connects the inland port of Marrenby to the open Sythe estuary.
bridge_claim: Cael Drummond oversees lock gates on a canal that connects Marrenby to the Sythe estuary.

ev1: The Lindquist Protocol enumerates six containment tiers for the Halloran spore vault.
ev2: Each containment tier in the Halloran spore vault is sealed with a Drennan pressure lock.
bridge_claim: The six containment tiers enumerated by the Lindquist Protocol are each sealed with a Drennan pressure lock.

ev1: The trading house of Velmoria stocks thirty-one spices from the Karreth coast.
ev2: Every spice from the Karreth coast is graded by the Sundermark inspection office.
bridge_claim: The thirty-one Karreth coast spices stocked by Velmoria are graded by the Sundermark inspection office.

ev1: Composer Anwen Floske wrote the processional anthem for the Greldeth coronation.
ev2: The Greldeth coronation is held within the vaulted hall of Castle Bryndovar.
bridge_claim: Anwen Floske wrote the processional anthem for a coronation held within Castle Bryndovar.

ev1: The Harrowby Cooperative farms eighteen terraced plots on the slopes of Mount Velden.
ev2: Each terraced plot on Mount Velden is irrigated by the ancient Toller cisterns.
bridge_claim: The eighteen terraced plots the Harrowby Cooperative farms on Mount Velden are irrigated by the Toller cisterns.

ev1: The Sennfaric Register lists forty lighthouses along the Crannock coastline.
ev2: Every lighthouse on the Crannock coastline burns oil refined at the Welbrin works.
bridge_claim: The forty lighthouses in the Sennfaric Register burn oil refined at the Welbrin works.

ev1: Director Pell Hargrove manages the seed bank at the Orvane research station.
ev2: The Orvane research station draws its entire funding from the Threllic Endowment.
bridge_claim: Pell Hargrove manages a seed bank at a station funded entirely by the Threllic Endowment.
